findings.description: The comment `// 更新対象データの取得処理は省略` is omitted from the s1 code block. This comment signals that a DB data retrieval step exists between the SessionUtil.delete and SessionUtil.put calls but is intentionally not shown. Without it, the code example appears to use an undefined `project` variable with no indication that a retrieval step is required.
findings.source_evidence: Source s1 code block contains: `// 更新対象データの取得処理は省略` between the SessionUtil.delete and SessionUtil.put lines

findings.location: s1, s2, s3, s4 hints arrays
findings.description: The PascalCase class `Project` appears in code examples across all four sections (e.g., `Project project = SessionUtil.get(...)`, `SessionUtil.put(ctx, "project", project)`) but is absent from the hints array of every section.
findings.source_evidence: `Project project = SessionUtil.get(ctx, "project");` appears in s2, s3, and s4 source code; `SessionUtil.put(ctx, "project", project)` in s1
